SCOPE: Only the three round-1 findings and the requested counts, caps, and determinism spot-check.
SUMMARY: All three structural findings are closed in the current workspace. This accepts the fix, not model quality, GPU completion, or promotion.

CRITERIA.criterion: Validation purity and executable final-list barrier

fresh_results.injected_provenance: teacher_derived=true and ground_truth=false refused with FidelityError before rewriting.

fresh_results.manifest_command_replay: Executed and failed closed at the intentionally absent pseudo_train.txt barrier after validator SHA, artifact-index, and closed-P1 checks.

CRITERIA.drift_results: Changed manifest bytes, train-list bytes, and referenced row bytes each caused build_pack to refuse before output. Individually injected mismatches for all six fields refused 6/6.

SPOT_CHECK.regeneration: 13/13 outputs byte-identical using a no-write in-memory regeneration against live inputs.

on_vm_preconditions: Transfer the exact reviewed working-tree bytes; normal git sync is insufficient because the builder and tests are untracked and lane/P1 artifacts are ignored.
Verify validator SHA 0304a352f18fef0c58d4a17dee216077c880137a3fe05b43c618808ec34ab68a and the artifact-index, pack, decode-plan, interleave, and six closed-P1 hashes above.
SHA-verify all 18 source videos, reject unsafe or escaping resolved paths, and verify actual decode counts and PTS cover every frozen frame index.
Record Ultralytics, CUDA, decoder, image size, seed, and resolved default NMS configuration.
Run person class 0 only at confidence >=0.60 with no geometry filter or four-player cap; do not reuse run_yolo26_teacher.py unchanged.
Materialize exactly 7200 candidate frames, retaining confidence for every detection and an explicit zero-detection state.
Materialize the exact 14400-entry 1:1 mixed list and run the SHA-pinned manifest validator successfully before creating data.yaml.
Preregister identical control/candidate initialization, image size, epochs, optimizer, augmentations, seeds, exposure budget, and scorer.
Require aggregate F1 and mAP50 deltas greater than zero and both deltas non-negative for each held-out family.
GPU_DISPATCH_DECISION.promotion_posture: VERIFIED=0, do_not_promote, experiment-only, and unresolved licensing remain binding regardless of outcome.

REVIEW_LIMITATIONS: No GPU inference or retraining was performed.
The read-only sandbox prohibited temporary filesystem mutation; regeneration used an in-memory write sink and drift was injected through the real hashing/build refusal paths.
